entry.title: Manchester City - OL : les compositions probables

link.title: Manchester City - OL : les compositions probables

entry.content: L’OL affronte Manchester City en quarts de finale de la Ligue des Champions . Voici ce que devraient nous réserver Pep Guardiola et Rudi Garcia.
entry.summary: L’OL affronte Manchester City en quarts de finale de la Ligue des Champions . Voici ce que devraient nous réserver Pep Guardiola et Rudi Garcia.

entry.title: Les documents établis après constatation de la mort

link.title: Les documents établis après constatation de la mort

entry.content:
Lorsqu’une personne décède, trois documents sont établis pour certifier la mort.
1. Le certificat de décès
Il est établi par le médecin après constatation de la mort dans les 24 heures (sauf en cas de mort violente : suicide, accident).
Dans cette hypothèse, la police ou la gendarmerie est avertie.
Ce document permet de déterminer l’heure, les causes et les circonstances du décès.
2. La déclaration de décès
Elle est établie en mairie dans la ville où le défunt est décédé.
Elle peut être faite par l’hôpital, la clinique ou la maison de retraite si la mort est survenue dans cet établissement, par les pompes funèbres mandatées ou par un proche détenant les informations figurant sur l’état civil du défunt.
Il faudra dans ce cas apporter :
- le certificat de décès,
- le livret de famille du défunt ou un extrait de naissance,
- et une pièce d’identité.
3. Le permis d’inhumer
Donné par l’officier d’état civil, il permet la fermeture et le transport du cercueil.
L’inhumation doit intervenir minimum 24 heures après le décès et au maximum, 6 jours ouvrés (hors dimanche et jours fériés) après le décès.
ou 6 jours après la date de rapatriement si le corps se trouve à l’étranger ou sur un territoire d’Outre-Mer.
entry.summary: Lorsqu’une personne décède, trois documents sont établis pour certifier la mort. 1. Le certificat de décès Il est établi par le médecin après constatation de la mort dans les 24 heures (sauf en cas de mort violente : suicide, accident). Dans cette hypothèse, la police ou la gendarmerie est avertie. Ce document permet de déterminer l’heure, les causes et les circonstances du décès. 2. La déclaration de décès Elle est établie en mairie dans la ville où le défunt est décédé. Elle peut être faite par l’hôpital, la clinique ou la maison de retraite si la mort est survenue dans cet établissement, par les pompes funèbres mandatées ou par un proche détenant les informations figurant sur l’état civil du défunt. Il faudra dans ce cas apporter : - le certificat de décès, - le livret de famille du défunt ou un extrait de naissance, - et une pièce d’identité. 3. Le permis d’inhumer Donné par l’officier d’état civil, il permet la fermeture et le transport du cercueil. L’inhumation doit intervenir minimum 24 heures après le décès et au maximum, 6 jours ouvrés (hors dimanche et jours fériés) après le décès. ou 6 jours après la date de rapatriement si le corps se trouve à l’étranger ou sur un territoire d’Outre-Mer.

entry.title: TikTok Need to Find US Based Owner or it Will be Forced to Shut operations : Trump Oneindia

link.title: TikTok Need to Find US Based Owner or it Will be Forced to Shut operations : Trump Oneindia

entry.content:
A new executive order issued by the President of the United States Donald Trump has given some relief to TikTok by extending the deadline to sell its US operations. The new order adds 45 days to the initial deadline. In total now TikTok has 90 days to find a US based owner or else it will be forced to shut operations in the US.
#TikTokinUS
#DonaldTrump
#MicrosofttoBuyTikTok
#TikTokUSoperations
#TikTokMicrosoftdeal
#MicrosoftByteDance
#TikTokinindia
#USA
#ChineseApps
#ChinaByteDance
#chinaapps
#TikTokvideos
#టిక్ టాక్
#59MobileApps
#PUBG
ప్రముఖ సోషల్ మీడియా ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్, ఎంటర్టైన్మెంట్ యాప్ టిక్‌టాక్ పై అమెరికా నిషేధం విధించటమే కాకుండా ఈ నిషేధం 45 రోజుల్లో అమల్లోకి రావాలని అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్ ఆదేశించిన విషయం తెలిసిందే . దీని కోసం ట్రంప్ చాలా సీరియస్ గా కార్యనిర్వాహక ఉత్తర్వును జారీ చేశారు .
entry.summary: A new executive order issued by the President of the United States Donald Trump has given some relief to TikTok by extending the deadline to sell its US operations. The new order adds 45 days to the initial deadline. In total now TikTok has 90 days to find a US based owner or else it will be forced to shut operations in the US. #TikTokinUS #DonaldTrump #MicrosofttoBuyTikTok #TikTokUSoperations #TikTokMicrosoftdeal #MicrosoftByteDance #TikTokinindia #USA #ChineseApps #ChinaByteDance #chinaapps #TikTokvideos #టిక్ టాక్ #59MobileApps #PUBG ప్రముఖ సోషల్ మీడియా ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్, ఎంటర్టైన్మెంట్ యాప్ టిక్‌టాక్ పై అమెరికా నిషేధం విధించటమే కాకుండా ఈ నిషేధం 45 రోజుల్లో అమల్లోకి రావాలని అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్ ఆదేశించిన విషయం తెలిసిందే . దీని కోసం ట్రంప్ చాలా సీరియస్ గా కార్యనిర్వాహక ఉత్తర్వును జారీ చేశారు .

entry.title: Cyclisme - Horreur en direct dans le Tour de Lombardie : Remco Evenepoel vient de faire une chute de plusieurs mètres en passant par dessus un pont

link.title: Cyclisme - Horreur en direct dans le Tour de Lombardie : Remco Evenepoel vient de faire une chute de plusieurs mètres en passant par dessus un pont

entry.content:
Le 114e Tour de Lombardie s’est élancé depuis Bergame à 12h20. Mais alors que tout se déroulait comme prévu, le Belge Remco Evenepoel est tombé dans un ravin, en pleine descente, en passant par-dessus un muret. L’ambulance est arrivée rapidement sur les lieux et les premières nouvelles de la Rai annonçaient que Remco est resté conscient après sa chute. On n’en sait pas plus sur ses éventuelles blessures.
Diffusée en direct sur la chaîne l’Equipe TV, la scène a glacé les téléspectateurs mais aussi les commentateurs qui étaient en direct.
entry.summary: Le 114e Tour de Lombardie s’est élancé depuis Bergame à 12h20. Mais alors que tout se déroulait comme prévu, le Belge Remco Evenepoel est tombé dans un ravin, en pleine descente, en passant par-dessus un muret. L’ambulance est arrivée rapidement sur les lieux et les premières nouvelles de la Rai annonçaient que Remco est resté conscient après sa chute. On n’en sait pas plus sur ses éventuelles blessures. Diffusée en direct sur la chaîne l’Equipe TV, la scène a glacé les téléspectateurs mais aussi les commentateurs qui étaient en direct.

entry.title: Guardiola : «Tout peut arriver sur un match» - Foot - C1 - Man. City

link.title: Guardiola : «Tout peut arriver sur un match» - Foot - C1 - Man. City

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOT - L’entraîneur de Manchester City Pep Guardiola a refusé ce vendredi le statut de favori pour son quart de finale de la Ligue des champions contre l’OL, prévu samedi (21 heures).
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOT - L’entraîneur de Manchester City Pep Guardiola a refusé ce vendredi le statut de favori pour son quart de finale de la Ligue des champions contre l’OL, prévu samedi (21 heures).

entry.title: MJ Hegar on Running Against John Cornyn, Expanding the Climate Conversation, and ‘Actually Giving a Shit’

link.title: MJ Hegar on Running Against John Cornyn, Expanding the Climate Conversation, and ‘Actually Giving a Shit’

entry.content: Jeff Goodell spoke with MJ Hegar, a Texas Democrat who is running to unseat three-term Republican Sen. John Cornyn, about the challenges of running a campaign amid a pandemic, bringing energy-industry workers into the climate change conversation, and what it means to “shoot like a girl.”
entry.summary: Jeff Goodell spoke with MJ Hegar, a Texas Democrat who is running to unseat three-term Republican Sen. John Cornyn, about the challenges of running a campaign amid a pandemic, bringing energy-industry workers into the climate change conversation, and what it means to “shoot like a girl.”

entry.title: Repression trailer - Thekla Reuten, Rebecca Front and Peter Mullan

link.title: Repression trailer - Thekla Reuten, Rebecca Front and Peter Mullan

entry.content:
Repression is a gripping and twisty Hitchcock-esque thriller set in Scotland with a staller British cast, including Peter Mullan and Rebecca Front.
When therapist Marianne moves to a remote area of Scotland, her attempts at a new life is thrown off course by one of her patients, ten-year-old Manny who claims he can see and control her future. Marianne struggles against both the wall of silence from her colleagues and her own mind as she tries to uncover the truth behind Manny’s drawings.
Directed by Elbert van Strien, the film also stars Thekla Reuten, Bill Paterson, Sam Hazeldine, Emun Elliott, Pearl Chanda, and Elijah Wolf.
Signature Entertainment presents Repression on Digital HD 28th September.
entry.summary: Repression is a gripping and twisty Hitchcock-esque thriller set in Scotland with a staller British cast, including Peter Mullan and Rebecca Front. When therapist Marianne moves to a remote area of Scotland, her attempts at a new life is thrown off course by one of her patients, ten-year-old Manny who claims he can see and control her future. Marianne struggles against both the wall of silence from her colleagues and her own mind as she tries to uncover the truth behind Manny’s drawings. Directed by Elbert van Strien, the film also stars Thekla Reuten, Bill Paterson, Sam Hazeldine, Emun Elliott, Pearl Chanda, and Elijah Wolf. Signature Entertainment presents Repression on Digital HD 28th September.

entry.title: Buchloe Haus brennt - Bewohner bei Löschversuch verletzt

link.title: Buchloe Haus brennt - Bewohner bei Löschversuch verletzt

entry.content:
Am frühen Samstagabend, 15.08.2020, mussten mehrere Feuerwehren aufgrund eines Brandes eines Wohn-Geschäftshauses in Buchloe, Lkrs. Ostallgäu, ausrücken.
Beim Eintreffen der Feuerwehr stand ein Raum des Hauses in Flammen und dunkle Rauchschwaden kamen aus den sämtlichen Fenstern. Die Feuerwehr konnte den Brand löschen. Insgesamt waren 84 Kräfte der umliegenden Wehren aus Buchloe, Lindenberg, Honsolgen und Jengen im Einsatz. Der Bewohner des Hauses wurde bei der Durchführung eines Löschversuchs verletzt und kam mit Verbrennungen und einer Rauchgasvergiftung ins Krankenhaus.
Die Ermittlungen vor Ort übernahm eine Streife des Kriminaldauerdienstes (KDD) der Kriminalpolizei Memmingen. Momentan wird von einem technischen Defekt als Brandursache ausgegangen. Der Sachschaden am Haus beläuft sich auf ca. 300.000 Euro.
Bilder & Mehr ->
entry.summary: Am frühen Samstagabend, 15.08.2020, mussten mehrere Feuerwehren aufgrund eines Brandes eines Wohn-Geschäftshauses in Buchloe, Lkrs. Ostallgäu, ausrücken. Beim Eintreffen der Feuerwehr stand ein Raum des Hauses in Flammen und dunkle Rauchschwaden kamen aus den sämtlichen Fenstern. Die Feuerwehr konnte den Brand löschen. Insgesamt waren 84 Kräfte der umliegenden Wehren aus Buchloe, Lindenberg, Honsolgen und Jengen im Einsatz. Der Bewohner des Hauses wurde bei der Durchführung eines Löschversuchs verletzt und kam mit Verbrennungen und einer Rauchgasvergiftung ins Krankenhaus. Die Ermittlungen vor Ort übernahm eine Streife des Kriminaldauerdienstes (KDD) der Kriminalpolizei Memmingen. Momentan wird von einem technischen Defekt als Brandursache ausgegangen. Der Sachschaden am Haus beläuft sich auf ca. 300.000 Euro. Bilder & Mehr ->

entry.title: Dolly Parton Reveals What She Admires About Taylor Swift Billboard’s 5-Minute Interview

link.title: Dolly Parton Reveals What She Admires About Taylor Swift Billboard’s 5-Minute Interview

entry.content: In this 5-Minute Interview, Dolly Parton Talks to Billboard about turning down Elvis Presley, what she admires about Taylor Swift, and more.
entry.summary: In this 5-Minute Interview, Dolly Parton Talks to Billboard about turning down Elvis Presley, what she admires about Taylor Swift, and more.

entry.title: How the internet grew the success of the Instant Pot

link.title: How the internet grew the success of the Instant Pot

entry.content: The Instant Pot became a viral sensation thanks to word-of-mouth marketing and its status as an Amazon bestseller. The multicooker costs around $100 and does nearly everything — except for run a strong marketing campaign. The company is more focused on putting resources into a good product, which clearly isn’t damaging the Instant Pot reputation. Mic’s Alexis Kleinman spoke with the creator and CEO of the company to learn more about the company’s business model.
entry.summary: The Instant Pot became a viral sensation thanks to word-of-mouth marketing and its status as an Amazon bestseller. The multicooker costs around $100 and does nearly everything — except for run a strong marketing campaign. The company is more focused on putting resources into a good product, which clearly isn’t damaging the Instant Pot reputation. Mic’s Alexis Kleinman spoke with the creator and CEO of the company to learn more about the company’s business model.

entry.title: From Tehran to Beirut to Baghdad

link.title: From Tehran to Beirut to Baghdad

entry.content:
From Tehran to Beirut to Baghdad to Damascus
There is a single monster responsible for people’s suffering: The Regime in Iran.
از تهران تا بیروت تا بغداد تا دمشق، یک اهریمن مسوول رنج مردم است: رژیم در ایران.
#شاهزاده_رضا_پهلوی
#درد_مشترک
#سکوت_جایز_نیست

entry.title: Michael Jordan’s sneakers sell for $615,000, new record

link.title: Michael Jordan’s sneakers sell for $615,000, new record

entry.content: A pair of Michael Jordan’s sneakers sold for $615,000, Christie’s auction house announced on Thursday, shattering a record set just months ago by the sale of another pair of the basketball legend’s shoes. The sneakers were a pair of Air Jordan 1 Highs that the NBA megastar wore during a 1985 exhibition match in Italy when he dunked the ball so hard it shattered the glass backboard
entry.summary: A pair of Michael Jordan’s sneakers sold for $615,000, Christie’s auction house announced on Thursday, shattering a record set just months ago by the sale of another pair of the basketball legend’s shoes. The sneakers were a pair of Air Jordan 1 Highs that the NBA megastar wore during a 1985 exhibition match in Italy when he dunked the ball so hard it shattered the glass backboard

entry.title: Andaman-Nicobar में Internet युग का आरंभ, जानिए समुद्र के नीचे केबल की खासियत वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Andaman-Nicobar में Internet युग का आरंभ, जानिए समुद्र के नीचे केबल की खासियत वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday said interacted with Bhartiya Janata Party workers of Andaman and Nicobar Islands via video conferencing. During his interaction, PM Modi said he was confident that high-speed broadband connectivity, which is scheduled to be launched tomorrow, will help people of Andaman & Nicobar Islands to have a virtual connect with other parts of the country.
अंडमान-निकोबार द्वीप समूह में इंटरनेट के नये युग का आरंभ हो गया है। अंडमान-निकोबार द्वीप समूह को सोमवार को प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी की ओर से नई सौगात मिली है। यहां केंद्र सरकार द्वारा सबमरीन ऑप्टिकल फाइबर केबल बिछाई गई है, जिसके जरिए पूरे द्वीप में फोन-इंटरनेट की कनेक्टविटी बेहतर हो सकेगी। बीएसएनल के जरिए इस प्रोजेक्ट को पूरा किया गया और समुद्र के नीचे केबल बिछी है. अब जब प्रोजेक्ट पूरा हुआ है तो अंडमान-निकोबार को 400 GB प्रति सेकेंड तक की स्पीड मिल पाएगी.
#AndamanNicobar #OpticalFibre #PMNarendraModi #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday said interacted with Bhartiya Janata Party workers of Andaman and Nicobar Islands via video conferencing. During his interaction, PM Modi said he was confident that high-speed broadband connectivity, which is scheduled to be launched tomorrow, will help people of Andaman & Nicobar Islands to have a virtual connect with other parts of the country. अंडमान-निकोबार द्वीप समूह में इंटरनेट के नये युग का आरंभ हो गया है। अंडमान-निकोबार द्वीप समूह को सोमवार को प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी की ओर से नई सौगात मिली है। यहां केंद्र सरकार द्वारा सबमरीन ऑप्टिकल फाइबर केबल बिछाई गई है, जिसके जरिए पूरे द्वीप में फोन-इंटरनेट की कनेक्टविटी बेहतर हो सकेगी। बीएसएनल के जरिए इस प्रोजेक्ट को पूरा किया गया और समुद्र के नीचे केबल बिछी है. अब जब प्रोजेक्ट पूरा हुआ है तो अंडमान-निकोबार को 400 GB प्रति सेकेंड तक की स्पीड मिल पाएगी. #AndamanNicobar #OpticalFibre #PMNarendraModi #OneindiaHindi

entry.title: Guy Faceplants Hard on Floor While Doing Backflip With Help of Friend

link.title: Guy Faceplants Hard on Floor While Doing Backflip With Help of Friend

entry.content:
This guy was trying to do a backflip with the help of his friend. His friend held one of his legs in his hands and pushed him backwards. However, the guy couldn’t flip properly and ended up faceplanting hard on the floor.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This guy was trying to do a backflip with the help of his friend. His friend held one of his legs in his hands and pushed him backwards. However, the guy couldn’t flip properly and ended up faceplanting hard on the floor. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Pénurie de fourrage : des agriculteurs s’entraident

link.title: Pénurie de fourrage : des agriculteurs s’entraident

entry.content:
Si la canicule est passée, les agriculteurs en subissent encore les conséquences. Chacun tente de trouver des alternatives.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Si la canicule est passée, les agriculteurs en subissent encore les conséquences. Chacun tente de trouver des alternatives. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: இன்ஸ்பெக்டர் அல்லிராணியின் தன்னலமற்ற செயல்.. சல்யூட் அடித்த திருவண்ணாமலை ஆட்சியர் - வீடியோ

link.title: இன்ஸ்பெக்டர் அல்லிராணியின் தன்னலமற்ற செயல்.. சல்யூட் அடித்த திருவண்ணாமலை ஆட்சியர் - வீடியோ

entry.content:
திருவண்ணாமலை: சுதந்திர தின விழா மேடையில் மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் திடீரென தான் நின்றிருந்த இடத்தில் பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டரை அழைத்து சல்யூட் அடித்து மரியாதை செய்த சம்பவம் விழாவில் பங்கேற்றவர்களை வியப்பில் ஆழ்த்தியுள்ளது. ஆட்சியர் மரியாதை செய்த அந்த பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டர் பெயர் அல்லிராணி. திருவண்ணாமலை மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் கந்தசாமிதான் பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டரை கவுரவப்படுத்தியவர்.
Tiruvannamalai District Collector Kandasamy invited the lady inspector to the dias and then he came down, and saluted Inspector Allirani for her selfless service. Inspector Allirani of Tiruvannamalai district who carried the dead body of a Covid-19 victim for cremation when the patient’s relatives refused to do it fearing infection, was honoured with commendation certificate by District Collector Kandasamy during the Independence Day celebrations .
Read more at:
entry.summary: திருவண்ணாமலை: சுதந்திர தின விழா மேடையில் மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் திடீரென தான் நின்றிருந்த இடத்தில் பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டரை அழைத்து சல்யூட் அடித்து மரியாதை செய்த சம்பவம் விழாவில் பங்கேற்றவர்களை வியப்பில் ஆழ்த்தியுள்ளது. ஆட்சியர் மரியாதை செய்த அந்த பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டர் பெயர் அல்லிராணி. திருவண்ணாமலை மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் கந்தசாமிதான் பெண் இன்ஸ்பெக்டரை கவுரவப்படுத்தியவர். Tiruvannamalai District Collector Kandasamy invited the lady inspector to the dias and then he came down, and saluted Inspector Allirani for her selfless service. Inspector Allirani of Tiruvannamalai district who carried the dead body of a Covid-19 victim for cremation when the patient’s relatives refused to do it fearing infection, was honoured with commendation certificate by District Collector Kandasamy during the Independence Day celebrations . Read more at:

entry.title: Bénabar, invité du Grand Quiz avec Bérénice Bourgueil et Eric Jean-Jean

link.title: Bénabar, invité du Grand Quiz avec Bérénice Bourgueil et Eric Jean-Jean

entry.content: Retrouvez Le Grand Quiz RTL avec Bérénice Bourgueil et Éric Jean-Jean du 07 août 2020 sur RTL.fr.

entry.title: 743 TTD Staff Tested Positive For COVID-19 భక్తుల విజ్ఞప్తి మేరకే ఆలయాన్ని తిరిగి తెరిచాం TTD EO

link.title: 743 TTD Staff Tested Positive For COVID-19 భక్తుల విజ్ఞప్తి మేరకే ఆలయాన్ని తిరిగి తెరిచాం TTD EO

entry.content:
743 staff of the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams (TTD) including some priests of the Lord Venkateswara shrine at Tirumala have tested positive for COVID-19 said TTD Executive Officer Anil Kumar Singhal. 402 members have recovered so far from infection while 338 people were undergoing treatment at different COVID care facilities.
#TTDstaffcorona
#TTDstafftestedCOVID19positive
#Tirumala
#TirumalaTirupatiDevasthanams
#TTDExecutiveOfficerAnilKumarSinghal
#Srivaridarshan
#LordBalajitemple
#TTDBoardmembersmeeting
#COVID19
#PMModi
#devotees
#coronavirus
#LordVenkateswaratemple
#తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం
తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం లో కరోనా కల్లోలం సృష్టిస్తుంది. టీటీడీ ఉద్యోగులకు , పూజారులకు కరోనా సోకటం టీటీడీకి ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది . తిరుమల పూజారులతో సహా తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం (టిటిడి) యొక్క సిబ్బంది కోవిడ్ -19 పరీక్షలు చేయించుకోగా 743 మందికి పాజిటివ్ గా నిర్ధారణ అయినట్టు తెలుస్తుంది . అయితే టీటీడీలో తాజా పరిస్థితి, మీడియాలో వస్తున్న కథనాలపై టీటీడీ ఈఓ స్పందించారు .
743 మంది సోకిన వారిలో జూన్ 11నుండి ఇప్పటి వరకు ముగ్గురు ఉద్యోగుల పరిస్థితి విషమించి, వారిలో వైరస్ తీవ్రంగా ఉండటంతో మరణించారని తెలిపారు. ఇప్పటివరకు 402 మంది సిబ్బంది కరోనా మహమ్మారి నుండి కోలుకున్నారని 338 మంది వివిధ కరోనా సంరక్షణ సౌకర్యాల వద్ద చికిత్స పొందుతున్నారని తెలిపారు . టిటిడి ఎగ్జిక్యూటివ్ ఆఫీసర్ అనిల్ కుమార్ సింఘాల్ విలేకరులతో మాట్లాడుతూ ఈ విషయం వెల్లడించారు.
entry.summary: 743 staff of the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams (TTD) including some priests of the Lord Venkateswara shrine at Tirumala have tested positive for COVID-19 said TTD Executive Officer Anil Kumar Singhal. 402 members have recovered so far from infection while 338 people were undergoing treatment at different COVID care facilities. #TTDstaffcorona #TTDstafftestedCOVID19positive #Tirumala #TirumalaTirupatiDevasthanams #TTDExecutiveOfficerAnilKumarSinghal #Srivaridarshan #LordBalajitemple #TTDBoardmembersmeeting #COVID19 #PMModi #devotees #coronavirus #LordVenkateswaratemple #తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం లో కరోనా కల్లోలం సృష్టిస్తుంది. టీటీడీ ఉద్యోగులకు , పూజారులకు కరోనా సోకటం టీటీడీకి ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది . తిరుమల పూజారులతో సహా తిరుమల తిరుపతి దేవస్థానం (టిటిడి) యొక్క సిబ్బంది కోవిడ్ -19 పరీక్షలు చేయించుకోగా 743 మందికి పాజిటివ్ గా నిర్ధారణ అయినట్టు తెలుస్తుంది . అయితే టీటీడీలో తాజా పరిస్థితి, మీడియాలో వస్తున్న కథనాలపై టీటీడీ ఈఓ స్పందించారు . 743 మంది సోకిన వారిలో జూన్ 11నుండి ఇప్పటి వరకు ముగ్గురు ఉద్యోగుల పరిస్థితి విషమించి, వారిలో వైరస్ తీవ్రంగా ఉండటంతో మరణించారని తెలిపారు. ఇప్పటివరకు 402 మంది సిబ్బంది కరోనా మహమ్మారి నుండి కోలుకున్నారని 338 మంది వివిధ కరోనా సంరక్షణ సౌకర్యాల వద్ద చికిత్స పొందుతున్నారని తెలిపారు . టిటిడి ఎగ్జిక్యూటివ్ ఆఫీసర్ అనిల్ కుమార్ సింఘాల్ విలేకరులతో మాట్లాడుతూ ఈ విషయం వెల్లడించారు.

entry.title: The Super Agent Behind Arsenal!

link.title: The Super Agent Behind Arsenal!

entry.content:
Hello and welcome back to Everything You Need To Know, where today we are giving you the lowdown on super agent Kia Joorabchian.
How did the Iranian born businessman rise up from relative obscurity, recover from a sporting scandal with Corinthians to orchestrate some of the most controversial and complicated transfers in football history? How did his links to ex Arsenal midfielder Edu see him brought into the fold in North London?
What sort of influence does he have? Why do the club trust him so much? And could Coutinho, follow his fellow Joorabchian clients David Luiz, Cedric Soares and Willian to the Emirates?
At a time when Mikel Arteta needs as much help as possible to return Arsenal back to the Champions League, will their determination to work with Joorabchian cost the club dearly?
Enjoy the episode guys and don’t forget to like and subscribe!
entry.summary: Hello and welcome back to Everything You Need To Know, where today we are giving you the lowdown on super agent Kia Joorabchian. How did the Iranian born businessman rise up from relative obscurity, recover from a sporting scandal with Corinthians to orchestrate some of the most controversial and complicated transfers in football history? How did his links to ex Arsenal midfielder Edu see him brought into the fold in North London? What sort of influence does he have? Why do the club trust him so much? And could Coutinho, follow his fellow Joorabchian clients David Luiz, Cedric Soares and Willian to the Emirates? At a time when Mikel Arteta needs as much help as possible to return Arsenal back to the Champions League, will their determination to work with Joorabchian cost the club dearly? Enjoy the episode guys and don’t forget to like and subscribe!

entry.title: Top 10 Secrets About How the Saw Traps Were Filmed

link.title: Top 10 Secrets About How the Saw Traps Were Filmed

entry.content: These are practical effects at their finest. For this list, we’re looking at the traps that were the most intricate and ingenious to create, from designing them to filming them.
